text.title: Trade-off Decision Methods Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-trade-off-decision-methods.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.code: { "adr_id": "adr-meth-mesh-vs-gateway-2026-05", "status": "accepted", "method": "atam", "rationale": "Multi-attribute conflict (perf vs security vs ops) across cross-team stakeholders; matrix insufficient to surface trade-offs.", "artefact_ref": "docs/atam/mesh-vs-gateway-2026-05.md", "review_trigger": "Traffic volume \u00d7 3 OR new mesh entrant changes operational maturity score.", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }
example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: adr_id pattern violation; method enum violation; rationale too short; artefact_ref empty; review_trigger empty; version + date malformed.
